file_summary: This file provides repository ingestion utilities for codebase indexing. It defines data classes for documents, errors, and results, and implements a RepoIngestor class that walks through repository files, applies filtering rules, reads content, and returns structured ingestion results.

line_windows.summary: Lines 1-80 contain the module docstring, imports, global constants, and three dataclass definitions. The constants define default ignored directories and allowed file extensions. RepoDocument represents a single ingested file with path, language, and content. IngestionError captures file-level failures. IngestionResult holds the complete ingestion output including root path, documents list, and errors list.

Lines 61-102 contain the RepoIngestor class implementation. This includes the __init__ method that sets up ignored directories and allowed extensions, the main ingest method that walks files, reads content, handles errors, and returns an IngestionResult, and the _iter_candidate_files helper that filters files based on directory ignores and extensions. The window also includes the _is_ignored method that checks if any parent directory is in the ignored set.
